lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. How are things with that gryphon?

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: Thankfully it hasn't been overly aggressive so far. It's important we keep it in check, but we don't want to go overboard and anger it unnecessary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any useful statistics for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I come in if I have a clue scroll?

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: A clue scroll, you say? Let me see...

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: Hmm... yes, that would appear to be this gryphon. Very well, I will allow you to fight it once, but no more than that.

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: Hello! You must be the human that's been helping out around here.

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: Well, I'm Nama, one of the elders who specialises in dealing with the gryphons.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pleased to meet you. So what brings you out here?

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: One of the more problematic gryphons has made a home in this cave. I'm here to keep an eye on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Perhaps I could help with that.

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: Help is always appreciated, but I wouldn't go charging in there without good reason. We don't want to anger the gryphon unnecessary.

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: Sorry, but I can't let you go in there without permission.

sections.title: Attempting to attack Shellbane Gryphon without a task

lines.speaker: Elder Nama
lines.text: Wait! That gryphon does not currently pose a threat to us. You shouldn't attack it without permission!
